info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, there will always be winners and losers.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life has a beginning, a middle and an end.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, one has to follow the rules of the game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To live life, one must roll the dice.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life there are opponents one must win against.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Without rules, life is a free-for-all.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When you die, the game is over.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is dealt with by the players.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you have a life, then you will have something to play.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes if you cheat in life, others will not want to play with you.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you cheat in life, you may disqualify yourself the rewards of winning.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Don't hate the player, hate life.
